body.title: Rename claimed_at → dispatched_at; remove ticket-claim language from queue
body.result: renamed claimed_at→dispatched_at throughout queue stack; removed cmd_claim dead stub; LegacyDirectClaimError retained
body.intention: I intend that all ticket-dispatch terminology in the queue uses dispatched_at/dispatch language so LLMs reading the codebase correctly interpret the state machine without confusion.
body.description:
LLMs misread 'claimed_at' as an autonomous-claim action rather than a Granny dispatch event, causing orphaned in_progress tickets. Same principle as renaming confusing terms for human teammates: rename to eliminate the recurring misunderstanding.

Rename claimed_at → dispatched_at throughout cc_queue.py and devices/queue/device.py. Remove cmd_claim dead stub (already raises LegacyDirectClaimError). Update log action strings ('claim_via_next' → 'dispatch_via_next', 'stale claim reset' → 'stale dispatch reset'). Update stall_check.py and any other consumers of the claimed_at field.

**Scope boundary — IMPORTANT:** Rename ticket-dispatch terminology ONLY. Do NOT touch devices/igor/cognition/action_claim_verifier.py or test_action_claim_verifier.py — that 'claim' refers to LLM action-claim verification (cognition domain, unrelated). Leave all cognition/action files untouched.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py, lab/claudecode/stall_check.py, devices/queue/device.py, tests/igor/test_cc_queue_claim_worker.py, tests/igor/test_cc_queue_strict_claim.py, tests/igor/test_cc_queue_dispatch_is_assignment.py, and any other test files referencing claimed_at (grep to find all)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every state change
**Scope boundary:** In scope: rename claimed_at field and all ticket-claim log strings in cc_queue.py + devices/queue/device.py + referencing test files. Out of scope: cognition action_claim_verifier, Granny state machine (dispatched/acked/in_progress already correct there), any UI beyond field names.
**Completion criteria:** `grep -r 'claimed_at\|cmd_claim\|claim_via_next' lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py` returns 0 results; action_claim_verifier.py is untouched; all tests pass; queue JSON shows dispatched_at field.
